description: Federal Reserve expected to signal halt on rate hikes. Major implication for USD-denominated emerging market debt.
Turkey Central Bank meeting. Markets watching for hawkish shift to combat Lira volatility.
India's growth forecast update. Inflation targets remain primary focus.
Crucial review for next tranche of bailout. Failure to meet targets could trigger immediate stress spike.
Brazil's central bank deciding on SELIC rate. Fiscal stability concerns rising.
South Africa goes to the polls. Results will determine fiscal trajectory for the next 5 years.
Argentina faces $2.4B interest payment. Default risk reaches local peak.
Egypt economic growth data. Vital for assessing impact of recent currency devaluation.
Nigeria CPI data. Expected to show impact of fuel subsidy removal.
Global trade growth projections for H2 2026. Critical for export-led economies.
